series_metadata.series_description: Project files contain original proposals, original agreements, original quarterly reports and correspondence (i.e. scope changes, additional time or money) and information relating to the general conduct of the project.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Records are kept in the active area for one year after the final report is received. After a years records are retained as completed projects in office filing cabinets for another two years. ; Electronic: After two years completed files are scanned and paper copies are destroyed. Scanned images are kept for another seven years for a total of 10 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
